summary: M434 — Battle grid v3 reliability pass. Killed the legacy EvBattlefield SVG/DOM grid (the 'old squares') so canvas is the single rendering path: position tiles are drawn on canvas at the M433 column positions, status-effect particle indicators are anchored to live canvas (x,y) instead of SVG grid coords, and spell targeting now resolves through a canvas pointer-down hit-test (no SVG tile click). Combat backgrounds always paint (no transparent canvas over a missing SVG). EvBattlefield is no longer imported or mounted; remaining EvBattlefield references no-op until M435 deletes the file.
